refined_caption: The hospital food appears to be contaminated and unhygienic. Visible signs of contamination are present on the food.
complaint_description: I was served food in the hospital that looked contaminated and unhygienic. The food had visible signs of spoilage and I am concerned about the risk of infection. I request that the hospital takes immediate action to address this issue.
voice_text: The food they're serving here is disgusting and looks contaminated, I don't think it's safe to eat.
